title: Reach authentication from landing page
description: Verifies a prospect can navigate from the landing page to the authentication page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call-to-action to sign in or get started
Verify the authentication page is displayed

title: Sign in with email/password and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in with email and password and is redirected to the protected dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to sign-in mode if needed
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Redirect unauthenticated user from dashboard to auth
description: Verifies an unauthenticated visitor cannot access the dashboard and is redirected to the authentication page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the authentication page is displayed

title: Dashboard loads boards list or empty state after login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the dashboard and sees either a board grid or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Toggle to sign-in mode if needed
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Click the navigation item to go to the dashboard if not already there
Verify boards are displayed or an empty state is displayed

title: Create a new board from the dashboard and land on its canvas
description: Verifies an authenticated member can create a new board from the dashboard and is taken to the new board canvas successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Trigger the create new board control
Verify the user lands on a board canvas view

title: Open an existing board from the dashboard board list
description: Verifies an authenticated member can open an existing board from the dashboard list and reach the correct canvas view.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Trigger the create new board control
Click the control to return to the dashboard
Click the board item for the newly created board in the board list
Verify the user lands on a board canvas view

title: Add a frame, sketch, and save edits to update the frame state
description: Verifies an authenticated member can add a frame on the canvas, edit it in the sketch editor, save, and see the frame updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Trigger the create new board control
Add a new frame to the canvas
Open the sketch editor for the frame
Draw on the sketch canvas
Save the sketch edits
Verify the frame shows an updated saved sketch state

title: AI polish can be triggered for a sketched frame and shows in-flight progress UI
description: Verifies a member can start AI polish for a frame with a sketch and sees an in-progress state indicating the job started.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Trigger the create new board control
Add a new frame to the canvas
Open the sketch editor for the frame
Draw on the sketch canvas
Save the sketch edits
Trigger the AI polish action for the frame
Verify the frame shows an in-flight or progress state for AI polish

title: Start video generation after providing required prompt and style
description: Verifies a member can open the AI panel on a newly created board, provide required prompt and style, start video generation, and see in-progress/job-started UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Click the create board action
Open the AI panel on the canvas
Select a valid animation style
Fill a valid prompt into the prompt field
Start video generation
Verify an in-progress or job-started indicator is displayed for the generation

title: Enable public access and copy share URL
description: Owner opens a board, opens Share, sets public access to view-with-link, verifies the share URL field contains /board/, clicks Copy, and sees a visible success state (e.g. Copied!) without asserting clipboard contents.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth and sign in with {{LOGIN_USER}} / {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing board from the dashboard (or create one if the list is empty)
Open the share UI via share-open-button
Set public access select to view (Anyone with link can view)
Public access select shows the Anyone with link can view option as selected
Share link input value contains the substring /board/
Click share-copy-link-button
Copy control shows visible success text such as Copied! (do not assert navigator.clipboard readback)

title: Open a publicly shared board as an anonymous visitor
description: Verifies a board with public access enabled can be opened in a fresh session via its share URL and loads as a read-only public view.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Click the create board action
Open the share UI for the board
Enable public access for the board
Click the share link to open the public board view
Verify the board loads in a read-only public view

title: Navigate to export UI and see presets and format options
description: Verifies a member can reach the export page for a board and the export UI renders presets, format options, and a player area or empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the authentication form
Click the create board action
Click the navigation to open the export UI
Verify export presets and format options are displayed
Verify a video player area or an empty state is displayed

title: Polish provider failure surfaces as user-visible error
description: When the polish edge function returns an error, the user sees an error notification (floating-notification type error) rather than silent failure.

steps.description: Sign in and open a board with at least one sketched frame (or create sketch via editor)
Stub Supabase polish-sketch invoke to return an error response
Trigger single-frame polish (wand on frame)
Verify floating-notification with data-notification-type=error and message containing Polish failed

title: Video generation failure shows inline error in AI panel
description: When generate-video returns status error JSON, the AI panel shows data-ai-panel-error with the provider message.

steps.description: Sign in and open a board where Generate Video is enabled (all frames polished with images)
Stub generate-video edge function to return { status: error, error: Simulated video failure }
Open Generate Video section and click ai-video-generate-button
Verify [data-ai-panel-error] is visible with failure text

title: Missing frame image blocks video generation with warning
description: Frames without drawable images keep Generate Video disabled and show ai-video-frames-not-ready guidance.

steps.description: Sign in, create a new board, add a frame without sketch/polish
Verify ai-video-generate-button is disabled
Verify ai-video-frames-not-ready mentions Missing images or Polish first

title: Export page empty video list shows safe fallback copy
description: When no videos exist for a board, export shows export-no-videos-hint instead of crashing.

steps.description: Sign in, open a board, navigate to /export/:boardId
Verify data-testid export-no-videos-hint is visible with No videos generated yet

title: Public view-only board disables editing affordances
description: Anonymous user on /board/:id with public view sees canvas-read-only-banner and cannot use toolbar-add-frame.

steps.description: Open a publicly shared view-only board URL in a fresh browser context without auth
Verify canvas-read-only-banner is visible
Verify toolbar-add-frame is disabled

title: Export route redirects unauthenticated users to auth
description: Hitting /export/:boardId while logged out must land on /auth (protected route).

steps.description: In a fresh context, navigate to /export/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001
Verify URL ends with /auth

title: Frame persists on canvas after full page reload
description: After adding a frame and reloading, at least one frame-card-* element remains.

steps.description: Sign in, open board, add a frame via toolbar-add-frame
Reload the page and wait for Loading board to clear
Verify locator [data-testid^=frame-card-] count is at least 1

title: Invalid canvas board id shows Board Not Found state
description: Navigating to /canvas/:invalidUuid as an authenticated user shows board-state-not-found or board-state-empty.

steps.description: Verify board-state-not-found or board-state-empty heading is visible
